meta: Aqua NYC's Meta connector has recovered: act_1057116046095292 returned full data for the first time since the 29 June token expiry.

Meta spend collapsed WoW at all three venues (Aqua -47 percent, Hutong NYC -65 percent, Miami -58 percent), from $11,248 to $4,891 combined. Confirm whether this is intentional pacing or a delivery issue.
Hutong NYC cost per schedule repaired hard, from $275 to $47.9, as spend normalised.
google: Google spend rose WoW at all three venues while Meta fell, so budget has effectively shifted toward search.
Aqua NYC leads on volume: $1,181 for 42 booking conversions at $28.11 CPA.
Hutong Miami remains the weakest at $61.18 per conversion, well above the $30 poor threshold.
ga4: Aqua NYC rebounded strongly post-July 4th: 298 bookings, up 37 percent WoW and 57 percent YoY.
Hutong NYC booked 105 against 358 last year. The LY figure includes a referral and widget path that no longer exists, so treat the -71 percent YoY as non-comparable rather than a genuine collapse.
Hutong Miami fell 35 percent WoW to 61 bookings as Meta spend was cut; users dropped to 1,442.
Miami shows zero GA4 Paid Social sessions despite $2,509 of Meta spend, which is a tracking gap worth fixing.
